text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, King Halo is interviewed for a
magazine.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Your casual clothes are so nice! They're very
natural and dignified!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I suppose my first-rate style just shows
through without any effort!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... we've taken photos of me in my
uniform, tracksuit, and casual clothes...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
With so many of my different sides on display,
this article will surely be a big hit.
choice_data_list:
Of course! Just look at you—you're the talk of
the town!

Of course! Just look at you—you're the talk of
the town!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Bring it on, I say! I'm not one to shy
away from the limelight!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's move on to the next shot. Which side of me
would you like to see next?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting. I'm changed and ready to go.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Your signature racewear will make for
an excellent shot!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But of course! It is me wearing it, after all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll run for you, so make sure to get the perfect
angle!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Her running form is a sight to behold! Just look at
her—chest out and head held high!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch King Halo's photo shoot, a surprised
voice pops out from behind me.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: No way! King's having her picture taken?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! Her signature racewear is so cool!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It really is! But then again, she would look great in
anything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's true! Everything she wears always looks
good on her, whether she's going out or staying
in!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But King herself said that she looks best in her
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yup! That was a little while back though...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! What are those clothes?! Are those new?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this is my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Like what you wear during a race? Wow, that's so
great!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm finally able to wear my signature racewear...
This is the outfit that suits me best—it's how I wish
everyone to see me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...But my goal is not simply to don this outfit. In
fact, this is only the first step!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You see, my mother designs signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's said she makes clothes that bring out the
distinctive qualities of each Umamusume who
wears them.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, so your mother made that outfit for you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Certainly not! No, this was designed by someone
else. There's no way my mother would make this
for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
She may have a strong sense of design, but her
judgment concerning Umamusume is sorely
lacking.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, I'll simply have to show her. She'll understand
when she sees me win in this!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Until then, I need to put it away and keep it safe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! I spilled my juice! My signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I didn't really get what she was saying at the end,
but I know she wants to wear that signature
racewear and do her best!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I can tell that signature racewear is very precious
to her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Phew... So, how did the photos come out?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this article will get rave reviews since it
features me in my signature racewear!
choice_data_list:
I'm looking forward to seeing many wins in that
outfit!

I'm looking forward to seeing many wins in that
outfit!

Your signature racewear really does look good
on you!

Your signature racewear really does look good
on you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this article will get rave reviews since it
features me in my signature racewear!
choice_data_list:
I'm looking forward to seeing many wins in that
outfit!

I'm looking forward to seeing many wins in that
outfit!

Your signature racewear really does look good
on you!

Your signature racewear really does look good
on you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's a foregone conclusion! I am King
Halo, after all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I shall claim victory at every major race in order
to prove that I'm first-rate! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's demeanor may be boisterous, but
underneath it all is a runner who holds incredible
passion for her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, you're not always so direct with your
compliments. Do you mean I look even more
enchanting than usual?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Er, hey... You don't have to stare like that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wait, is there a stain?! I thought I got all the juice
out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's her desire to win, but somehow she
looks even more radiant than usual wearing that
signature racewear.
